learning_delta: Mechanicus learns to reject weak pseudo-heraldry instead of accepting bad visuals.
TUI keeps honest sigil badges and delegates real heraldry to future enhanced visual mode.
Main dashboard stays compact, readable, and read-only.

pain_pattern.symptom: ASCII/block-art heraldry looked like random circuit diagrams, not true Mechanicus/Imperium emblems.
pain_pattern.decision: Remove fake heraldry from pure TUI. Preserve only small badges. Move true heraldry to enhanced visual mode.
